# Copilot Instructions

## Code Quality Rules
- Always follow clean code principles (SOLID, DRY, KISS)
- Avoid duplicated logic
- Use meaningful variable and function names
- Functions must be small and single-responsibility

## Code Review Rules
Before suggesting or finalizing any code:
- Analyze potential bugs and edge cases
- Suggest improvements for readability and performance
- Ensure proper error handling
- Add logging if necessary

## Before Deployment Checklist
- No console.log or debug code
- All functions have basic validation
- No hardcoded secrets
- Follow project architecture

## Output Requirement
- Always explain why changes are made
- Suggest refactoring if needed
